_publications._publicationTitle: Inhibition of autophagy as a novel treatment for neurofibromatosis type 1 tumors.

_contextSnippet: CQ resulted in increased lethality of dNf1C1 mutants compared to the WT control in a dose‐dependent manner...Furthermore, we were able to rescue the CQ sensitivity of dNf1C1 mutant flies by re‐expression of dNf1
details: CQ (35 μM) resulted in increased lethality compared to wild-type flies in a dose-dependent manner, with sensitivity rescued by re-expression of dNf1
